context: Tests whether swift-concurrency gives behavior-preserving diagnostic remediation and avoids over-broad sibling-skill scope.

checklist.name: Isolated Conformance
checklist.description: Uses @MainActor isolation or an isolated conformance such as extension StickerModel: @MainActor Exportable for UI-bound protocol conformance diagnostics.

checklist.name: Processor Isolation Choice
checklist.description: Explains when PhotoProcessor can stay on the caller's actor and when CPU-heavy work should move to @concurrent/nonisolated async code.

checklist.name: Sendable Restraint
checklist.description: Prefers value immutability, actor isolation, or synchronization over adding @unchecked Sendable by default.

checklist.name: Preconcurrency Bridge
checklist.description: Treats @preconcurrency import as a temporary bridge for third-party modules and includes a removal plan.

checklist.name: Sibling Boundaries
checklist.description: Routes architecture, navigation implementation, and detailed SwiftUI state ownership to sibling skills instead of expanding this skill's scope.
